successCriteria.description: src/modules/employee/employee.model.ts exists and exports Employee, CreateEmployeeDto, UpdateEmployeeDto, and EmployeeQueryParams interfaces with exact canonical attribute names
src/modules/employee/employee.repository.ts exists and exports IEmployeeRepository interface with all required methods
src/modules/notification/notification.model.ts exists and exports Notification and CreateNotificationDto interfaces with exact canonical attribute names
src/modules/notification/notification.repository.ts exists and exports INotificationRepository interface with all required methods

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
All interfaces must use exact canonical attribute names matching the authoritative per-phase architecture
outOfScope: Implementation of repository classes (deferred to Phase 6)
Service layer implementation (deferred to Phase 3 and Phase 7)
API controllers and routes (deferred to Phase 8 and Phase 9)
